message:
test(scripting): dual-engine integration test suite (wa-3dfxb.11)

Integration tests for cross-module interactions: full extension lifecycle
(install → load → disable → remove), event bus stress (100 handlers,
wildcard/prefix patterns), keybinding multi-extension registration,
storage isolation, .ftx package roundtrip, tier dispatch ordering,
and 10-extension concurrent coexistence. 9 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
